title: Define benchmark scenarios and fixtures for multi-project corpora
description: Specify benchmark scenarios for single-project vs recursive multi-project discovery, and define a reproducible fixture layout with multiple project folders under a monorepo tree.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Defined recursive discovery benchmark scenarios and deterministic fixture layout in planning/BENCHMARK_RECURSIVE_DISCOVERY.md. Added tools/benchmark_discovery_fixtures.py to generate single-project and multi-project corpora with fixed timestamps and identifiers.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Bench spec describes operations, dataset sizes, and folder layout. Fixture generator or static fixture structure exists and is deterministic.
